name: Dolce & Gabbana

acts.description: Stefano Gabbana called IVF-conceived children 'children of chemistry' and 'synthetic children'
2018 Chinese campaign depicting a Chinese model struggling to eat Italian food with chopsticks; withdrawn after outcry

behavior_summary: Multiple racist advertising campaigns; anti-IVF/LGBT comments. The China controversy effectively ended their business in China, one of their largest markets.

art.summary: Iconic Italian luxury fashion house known for maximalist, Mediterranean-influenced design.

verdict.blurb: Fashion legends who seem determined to insult their way through every minority demographic one bad campaign at a time. The suits are impeccable. The judgment is not.
